titleStmt.title: SII 35.10: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 10. (A.R. No. 69 of 1950-51.) KUṆṬAN-HOSAḶḶI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab from the bed of the tank called Huḍēdahoṇḍa now removed to the village chāvaḍi.

This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Āhavamalla Tailapa, is dated Śaka 906, Tāraṇa, Paushya śu. 5, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti corresponding to A.D. 984 November 30, Sunday. The sankranti occurred later.

It records a gift of land presumably for the upkeep of the tank by Eṟagāri, Maṇiyamma and Pāḍuva Kaliyamma, when Sōbhanarasa was governing the two six-hundred and Banavāsi-12000, Eṟagāri was holding the office of Nāḷgāmuṇḍu of the Five-hundred villages. Karmmegara Lōkayya was in charge of Ur-gāmuṇḍu and Pāḍuva Kaliyamma was administering the village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti prithavīvallabha mahārājādhirāja pa
ramabhaṭṭāraka śrīmadāhavamalla taylapadēva
pṛthuvīrājyaṁ geyye . śrīmat sōbhanarasaṁ
Eraḍaṟunūṟu banavāsipanni¨rccāsira
mumanāḷe nanniyagōva raṇaraṁgabhīma
kanbukadōja śrīmadeṟagāri Aynūṟu bā
ḍakkaṁ nāḻgāmuṇḍugeyye ka¨rmmegara lōkayya
nū¨rggāmuṇḍugeyye pāḍuva kaliyammanū
ranāḷe sakhava¨rṣa 906 neya tāraṇasaṁvatsara
pauṣya suddha paṁcami Ādityavāra Uttarāyaṇa
saṁkrāntiyandu beṇḍekeṟeya gaḻdeya yeraḍu
mattar keyyaneṟagāriyu maṇiyammanuṁ
pāḍuva kaliyammanumiḻdu biṭṭarida kādā
tāgaśvamēdhada phalamidanaḻidātā bāṇaḷida
yāḷaṁ sāsirakavileyanaḻida pātakanakku
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundarā ṣa
ṣṭiva¨rsasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyā jāyatē krimi
gūravara caṇḍika paṇavaṁ biṭṭa maṅgaḷa . keḷage
Digital edition of SII 35.10 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
